texts.orig: Low Season Special Offer : 1 night free on accommodation only will be included for bookings of 4 to 7 nights Extended Stay Discounts: 25% off for bookings of 8 to 14 nights | 30% off for bookings of 15 to 27 nights Discounts apply to accommodation only and are not applicable over Peak Season Long Stay Discounts: for bookings of 28 nights or more, please enquire for specific rates and additional T&Cs
